title_i18n.fr: HyperFrames : Bande-annonce de marque de 30 secondes
title_i18n.es: HyperFrames: Reel promocional de marca de 30 segundos
title_i18n.pt-BR: HyperFrames: Vídeo promocional de marca de 30 segundos
title_i18n.it: HyperFrames: Sizzle reel di brand da 30 secondi
title_i18n.vi: HyperFrames: Video quảng cáo thương hiệu 30 giây

description: A 30-second 16:9 HyperFrames sizzle reel — fast cuts, beat-synced kinetic typography, audio-reactive scale on display words, shader transitions between five scenes, end-card with logo bloom. Modelled on the aisoc-hype archetype from the student kit.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 30 秒 16:9 HyperFrames 宣传片——快速切换、节拍同步动态字体、音频响应式文字缩放、五个场景间的着色器过渡、带 logo 绽放效果的片尾卡。基于学生套件中的 aisoc-hype 原型。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 30 秒 16:9 HyperFrames 宣傳片——快速切換、節拍同步動態字體、音訊響應式文字縮放、五個場景間的著色器過渡、帶 logo 綻放效果的片尾卡。基於學生套件中的 aisoc-hype 原型。
description_i18n.ja: 30秒 16:9 HyperFrames プロモーション映像 — 高速カット、ビート同期キネティックタイポグラフィ、オーディオリアクティブなテキストスケール、5つのシーン間のシェーダートランジション、ロゴブルーム付きエンドカード。学生キットの aisoc-hype アーキタイプをベースにしています。
description_i18n.ko: 30초 16:9 HyperFrames 홍보 영상 — 빠른 컷, 비트 동기화 키네틱 타이포그래피, 오디오 반응형 텍스트 스케일, 5개 장면 간 셰이더 전환, 로고 블룸이 포함된 엔딩 카드. 학생 키트의 aisoc-hype 아키타입을 기반으로 합니다.
description_i18n.de: Ein 30-sekündiges 16:9 HyperFrames Sizzle-Reel – schnelle Schnitte, beat-synchronisierte kinetische Typografie, audio-reaktive Skalierung von Anzeigetexten, Shader-Übergänge zwischen fünf Szenen, Abspann mit Logo-Bloom. Basiert auf dem aisoc-hype-Archetyp aus dem Studenten-Kit.
description_i18n.fr: Une bande-annonce HyperFrames 16:9 de 30 secondes — montages rapides, typographie cinétique synchronisée au rythme, échelle réactive audio sur les mots affichés, transitions shader entre cinq scènes, carte de fin avec effet bloom du logo. Basé sur l'archétype aisoc-hype du kit étudiant.
description_i18n.ru: 30-секундный ролик HyperFrames 16:9 — быстрые нарезки, кинетическая типографика с синхронизацией по биту, аудиореактивное масштабирование текста, шейдерные переходы между пятью сценами, финальная карточка с bloom-эффектом логотипа. На основе архетипа aisoc-hype из студенческого набора.
description_i18n.es: Un reel promocional HyperFrames 16:9 de 30 segundos — cortes rápidos, tipografía cinética sincronizada con el ritmo, escala audio-reactiva en palabras de visualización, transiciones shader entre cinco escenas, tarjeta final con efecto bloom del logo. Basado en el arquetipo aisoc-hype del kit para estudiantes.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Um vídeo promocional HyperFrames 16:9 de 30 segundos — cortes rápidos, tipografia cinética sincronizada com a batida, escala áudio-reativa nas palavras exibidas, transições shader entre cinco cenas, cartão final com efeito bloom do logo. Baseado no arquétipo aisoc-hype do kit estudantil.
description_i18n.it: Uno sizzle reel HyperFrames 16:9 da 30 secondi — tagli veloci, tipografia cinetica sincronizzata al ritmo, scala audio-reattiva sulle parole visualizzate, transizioni shader tra cinque scene, schermata finale con effetto bloom del logo. Basato sull'archetipo aisoc-hype del kit per studenti.
description_i18n.vi: Video quảng cáo HyperFrames 16:9 dài 30 giây — cắt nhanh, chữ động học đồng bộ nhịp điệu, tỷ lệ phản ứng âm thanh trên văn bản hiển thị, chuyển cảnh shader giữa năm cảnh, thẻ kết với hiệu ứng bloom logo. Dựa trên nguyên mẫu aisoc-hype từ bộ công cụ sinh viên.
description_i18n.pl: 30-sekundowy sizzle reel HyperFrames 16:9 — szybkie cięcia, kinetyczna typografia zsynchronizowana z beatem, reaktywne na dźwięk skalowanie słów, przejścia shaderowe między pięcioma scenami, końcowa plansza z efektem bloom logo. Oparty na archetypie aisoc-hype z zestawu studenckiego.
description_i18n.id: Reel promosi HyperFrames 16:9 berdurasi 30 detik — pemotongan cepat, tipografi kinetik tersinkronisasi beat, skala reaktif audio pada kata tampilan, transisi shader antara lima adegan, kartu akhir dengan efek bloom logo. Didasarkan pada arketipe aisoc-hype dari kit pelajar.
description_i18n.nl: Een 30-seconden 16:9 HyperFrames-promo — snelle cuts, beat-gesynchroniseerde kinetische typografie, audio-reactieve schaal op weergavewoorden, shader-overgangen tussen vijf scènes, eindkaart met logo-bloom. Gebaseerd op het aisoc-hype archetype uit de studentenkit.
description_i18n.ar: فيديو ترويجي HyperFrames بنسبة 16:9 مدته 30 ثانية — قطع سريعة، طباعة حركية متزامنة مع الإيقاع، تحجيم تفاعلي صوتي على الكلمات المعروضة، انتقالات shader بين خمسة مشاهد، بطاقة نهائية مع تأثير bloom للشعار. مبني على نموذج aisoc-hype من مجموعة الطلاب.
description_i18n.tr: 30 saniyelik 16:9 HyperFrames tanıtım videosu — hızlı kesimler, ritimle senkronize kinetik tipografi, görüntülenen kelimelerde ses-reaktif ölçekleme, beş sahne arasında shader geçişleri, logo bloom efektli bitiş kartı. Öğrenci kitindeki aisoc-hype arketipine dayalıdır.
description_i18n.uk: 30-секундний ролик HyperFrames 16:9 — швидкі зміни кадрів, кінетична типографіка з синхронізацією за бітом, аудіореактивне масштабування тексту, шейдерні переходи між п'ятьма сценами, фінальна картка з bloom-ефектом логотипу. На основі архетипу aisoc-hype зі студентського набору.
description_i18n.en: A 30-second 16:9 HyperFrames sizzle reel — fast cuts, beat-synced kinetic typography, audio-reactive scale on display words, shader transitions between five scenes, end-card with logo bloom. Modelled on the aisoc-hype archetype from the student kit.

query.en:
Build a 30-second HyperFrames sizzle reel (1920×1080, 30fps) — five scenes hammered to a tempo, beat-synced display words, restrained color, one logo outro. The audio is a 90 BPM bed track (`bed.mp3`) — every scene cut and major pop lands on a beat (every 666ms). Use the audio-reactive reference for amplitude-driven scale, and pull `npx hyperframes add flash-through-white`, `npx hyperframes add cinematic-zoom`, `npx hyperframes add chromatic-radial-split`, `npx hyperframes add logo-outro`.

Visual identity: ink canvas #0a0a0a, single jewel accent #f0c14b, off-white #f7f3e8. Display: "Druk Wide" 220px (or "Anton") for one-word scenes; body "Inter" 28px; tabular-nums on any number scene.

Scene 1 (0–6s) WHO — full-bleed display word "BUILD" centered, scales 0.92→1 ease expo.out 0.5s on the first beat (beat 1, t=0.0s), then audio-amplitude reacts on every beat with a +2% scale pop (use audio-reactive: map 0–80Hz amplitude → scale, dampened). At 4s the kicker line "a film about shipping" fades in below at 36px. Transition at 6.0s → flash-through-white, 0.4s.

Scene 2 (6.4–12s) WHAT — three quick cuts inside the scene of static product photography (img clips), each 1.8s, with x-axis whip-pan transitions between them (`whip-pan` shader, 0.25s each). Caption mode: a single mono line at the bottom changes per cut.
Transition at 12.0s → chromatic-radial-split, 0.5s.

Scene 3 (12.5–18.5s) STATS — three numbers, each in a dedicated 2s slot, animated with apple-money-count-style counters (use the catalog block as reference). 0 → 12k, 0 → 4.2×, 0 → $1.4M. Tabular-nums forced.
Transition at 18.5s → cinematic-zoom, 0.5s.

Scene 4 (19.0–25.0s) PEOPLE — three back-to-back testimonial pull-quotes typeset like NYT, each 2s, with a left hairline rule extending in from y=0 over 0.4s before the quote types in via a clip-path reveal.
Transition at 25.0s → flash-through-white, 0.3s.

Scene 5 (25.3–30s) END-CARD — logo-outro block: wordmark piece-by-piece assembly over 1.4s with #f0c14b bloom; one-line CTA fades in at 28.5s; hold to 30s.

Non-negotiables: every cut on a beat, no orphan motion; min 60px headlines; entrance-only (transitions handle exits); deterministic; all timelines paused:true; root data-duration=30. Run lint/validate/inspect. Output: `brand-sizzle-30s.mp4`.
query.zh-CN:
使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build a 30-second HyperFrames sizzle reel (1920×1080, 30fps) — five scenes hammered to a tempo, beat-synced display words, restrained color, one logo outro. The audio is a 90 BPM bed track (`bed.mp3`) — every scene cut and major pop lands on a beat (every 666ms). Use the audio-reactive reference for amplitude-driven scale, and pull `npx hyperframes add flash-through-white`, `npx hyperframes add cinematic-zoom`, `npx hyperframes add chromatic-radial-split`, `npx hyperframes add logo-outro`.

Visual identity: ink canvas #0a0a0a, single jewel accent #f0c14b, off-white #f7f3e8. Display: "Druk Wide" 220px (or "Anton") for one-word scenes; body "Inter" 28px; tabular-nums on any number scene.

At 4s the kicker line "a film about shipping" fades in below at 36px. Transition at 6.0s → flash-through-white, 0.4s.

Scene 2 (6.4–12s) WHAT — three quick cuts inside the scene of static product photography (img clips), each 1.8s, with x-axis whip-pan transitions between them (`whip-pan` shader, 0.25s each). Caption mode: a single mono line at the bottom changes per cut.
Transition at 12.0s → chromatic-radial-split, 0.5s.

Scene 3 (12.5–18.5s) STATS — three numbers, each in a dedicated 2s slot, animated with apple-money-count-style counters (use the catalog block as reference). 0 → 12k, 0 → 4.2×, 0 → $1.4M. Tabular-nums forced.
Transition at 18.5s → cinematic-zoom, 0.5s.

Scene 4 (19.0–25.0s) PEOPLE — three back-to-back testimonial pull-quotes typeset like NYT, each 2s, with a left hairline rule extending in from y=0 over 0.4s before the quote types in via a clip-path reveal.
Transition at 25.0s → flash-through-white, 0.3s.

Scene 5 (25.3–30s) END-CARD — logo-outro block: wordmark piece-by-piece assembly over 1.4s with #f0c14b bloom; one-line CTA fades in at 28.5s; hold to 30s.

Non-negotiables: every cut on a beat, no orphan motion; min 60px headlines; entrance-only (transitions handle exits); deterministic; all timelines paused:true; root data-duration=30. Run lint/validate/inspect. Output: `brand-sizzle-30s.mp4`.
